instruction: Please write something up for the River North front desk volunteers and save it in /Operations/Guides. It should explain how they start the mail log each morning, where paper donation receipts get placed, and who to contact when printer paper or envelopes run low.

rule_ref.rule_text: When creating office guidance for others, she prefers a reusable template instead of a one-off document.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: My rule is to make reusable templates when I’m documenting a process others will follow.

attributes.title: River North Front Desk Closing Instructions
attributes.content_brief: End-of-day steps for volunteers, including lobby cabinet lockup, visitor sheet sign-off, and petty cash envelope drop.

attributes.title: Office Supply Reorder Notes
attributes.content_brief: Where backup paper and envelopes are stored and the admin contact for restocking.

attributes.title: Donation Receipt Routing
attributes.content_brief: Paper receipt handling steps before finance pickup.

attributes.title: Vehicle Checkout Sheet
attributes.content_brief: Reusable form for recording sign-out time, return time, driver name, and fuel level.
